comparison_read: Old 8GPU TF none 100k run blew up badly; it is the unstable reference that motivated the decay10k diagnostic.
production_read: Do not use as a production setting.

comparison_read: Reducing decay_steps from 100000 to 10000 dramatically stabilized the 8GPU TF none run and removed the old catastrophic training and validation blowup.
production_read: Promising diagnostic, but not enough to move the default beyond 4GPU TF/PT.

comparison_read: The same decay10k change did not stabilize 16GPU: it timed out at step 77270 after the training loss had already blown up.
production_read: Decay10k is not a universal fix; keep the recommended default at 4GPU TF/PT with scale_by_worker=none.
